title: Define v3.8 operator briefing layer above situation assessment
description: Turn runtime situation judgment into a compact operator-facing brief that explains what is happening, why it is happening, what is blocked, and what should happen next without depending on the viewer as the primary surface.
triage_notes: Completed and released as v3.8.0. Closed during release finalization so shipped operator-briefing work no longer remains on the open runtime path.
